LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF YASSER KHAIRI'S MOTION FOR RELIEF PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SEC. 473 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND TO THE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS, SET 2 IS THE RESULT OF EXCUSABLE MISTAKE AND INADVERTENCE PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 2033.300 (A) & (B). THE ORDER DATED SEPTEMBER 24, 2013 IS VACATED AS TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS, SET 2 DEEMED ADMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED SANCTIONS IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1,500 PAYABLE WITHIN 10 DAYS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Relief Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sec. 473
Off Calendar Apr-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID SHANE, TEL. NO. 464-2020 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAMES P. MOLINELLI OF THE STRATMAN PETTERSON & HUNTER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (510) 457-3471 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF YASSER KHAIRI's Motion For Relief Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sec. 473 is granted. Plaintiff's failure to respond to the Request for Admissions, Set 2 is the result of excusable mistake and inadvertence pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.300 (a) & (b). The Order dated September 24, 2013 is vacated as to the Requests for Admissions, Set 2 deemed admitted. THE COURT GRANTED SANCTIONS IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1,500 PAYABLE WITHIN 10 DAYS. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS EDWARD WONG and MARGARET WONG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied, without prejudice. (CCP 1014.) Defendants Edward Wong and Margaret Wong (collectively "Defendants") failed to serve their motion for summary judgment on all parties who have appeared in this action. On December 5, 2012, Defendant Richard Thomas appeared in this action by filing his answer. (CCP 1014. See Answer, filed Dec. 5, 2012.) "After appearance, a defendant or the defendant's attorney is entitled to notice of all subsequent proceedings of which notice is required to be given." (Id.) Defendants served their motion for summary judgment on Plaintiff, but failed to serve Defendant Richard Thomas. (See Notice of Motion Proof of Service, executed on Dec. 18, 2013, p. 6:17, 7:3-7.) Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
